title: bidens ghedoensis
intro: Bidens ghedoensis, also known as the Ghideo bident, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. It is native to Ethiopia and is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating digestive problems. In terms of herbal preparations, Bidens ghedoensis is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as in traditional remedies and concoctions.
